title: Spark Quiz Battle
subtitle: Bouncy, family-friendly trivia game for the whole couch!
description: Engage in quick-fire multiplayer trivia matches natively hosted over regional servers. Supports 1-4 players casting actions instantly from their mobile wands.

title: Spark's Ludo Battle
subtitle: Experience an exciting, fun and unpredictable party game inspired from Ludo - Spark style. Up to 4 wands can play and battle. The winner gets the crown!
description: Engage in fun Ludo games! Up to 4 wands. Experience an exciting, fun and unpredictable party game inspired from Ludo - Spark style. Up to 4 wands can play and battle. The winner gets the crown!

title: Spark's Triviashow
subtitle: A high-fidelity trivia modern show built natively for Spark. Battle with your peers and earn the most money. Show the world what you know.
description: A high-fidelity trivia modern show built natively for Spark. Battle with your peers and earn the most money. Show the world what you know.
